name: Day 1 — Klaviyo flow audit
prompt: One-time on day 1. Read every Klaviyo flow via Composio. Identify which of the 4 must-haves are missing or broken: Welcome series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Winback. Propose drafts. Output to outputs/day1-flow-audit.md and iMessage Caner.

name: Daily segment hygiene
prompt: Pull active / engaged / lapsed / VIP segment counts via Klaviyo. Append to outputs/segment-hygiene.jsonl. Flag any segment that swings >10% day-over-day.

name: Weekly broadcast plan
prompt: Plan one campaign for the upcoming week. Theme from content calendar (Notion). Draft subject A/B/C variants. Run brand-voice-check. Save as Klaviyo draft. iMessage Caner the plan.

name: Thursday broadcast send-prep
prompt: Final QA on Tuesday's drafted campaign. Recipient count check vs 5k Guardrail cap. Predict open + revenue per recipient based on last 5 sends. iMessage Caner SEND or HOLD recommendation.

name: Friday broadcast recap
prompt: For any campaign sent in last 24h: pull open rate, CTR, revenue, attributed orders. Compare to last 5 sends. Append to outputs/broadcasts.jsonl. Surface in Sunday weekly-flow-report.

name: Monday flow performance report
prompt: Pull last 7 days per-flow metrics from Klaviyo: revenue, recipients, revenue/recipient. Identify the underperforming flow. Propose 1 optimisation per week (subject test, timing change, segment refinement). iMessage Caner.
